component.name: ABS2Kindle
component.summary: Send ebooks from Audiobookshelf to your Kindle

description.p: ABS2Kindle connects your Audiobookshelf server to a connected Kindle device. Browse your library, select ebooks, and send them directly to your Kindle — automatically converting EPUB to AZW3 via Calibre and injecting the correct ASIN so Whispersync works.

ul.li: Browse Audiobookshelf libraries and Home shelves
Auto-detects connected Kindle devices (KDE/kmtpd, GNOME/GVFS, jmtpfs)
Converts EPUB → AZW3 with ASIN injection for Whispersync
Transfer progress overlay with per-book status
Shows which books are already on the device

description.p: Initial release featuring transfer progress overlay, concurrent transfers, Home view with personalized shelves, ASIN and on-Kindle badges, and search preservation across library refreshes.
